title: Mossel Bay SPCA desperately needs puppy, kitten food
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA’s Mossel Bay branch is in dire need of food for the puppies and kittens it houses.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA’s Mossel Bay branch is in dire need of food for the puppies and kittens it houses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The branch’s adoption manager, Kay Ievers, said at this stage the organisation only has about a month’s supply of food for its little ones before it runs out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said the branch desperately needs kibble and pellets, specifically for puppies and kittens.","html":"She said the branch desperately needs kibble and pellets, specifically for puppies and kittens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ievers said anyone can come to the branch at 18 Bill Jeffery Street, Boplaas, Mossel Bay, to drop off the food, or call the branch on 044 693 0824 to arrange for someone to pick it up.","html":"Ievers said anyone can come to the branch at 18 Bill Jeffery Street, Boplaas, Mossel Bay, to drop off the food, or call the branch on 044 693 0824 to arrange for someone to pick it up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay SPCA desperately needs puppy, kitten food
